title: CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY - 211info
text: EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services for infants, toddlers, and preschool-aged children. Sessions include both the child and their parents or caregivers. Counseling is available in the office, at home, or in the classroom. Focus areas include family therapy, strengthening attachment, and addressing emotional and behavioral concerns. Services are trauma-informed. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: OHP-covered children age 6 and younger and their families. Priority given to families already enrolled in other Relief Nursery services Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (541) 343-9706 136 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 343-9706 Main phone Main phone (541) 343-9706 ext 136 Terrence Killian [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Services: Child Guidance Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ACCESSING SUCCESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY
